AI file organizer for messy Downloads, Desktop, and Documents folders

Foldora is a Windows and macOS AI file organizer for Downloads, Desktop, Documents, PDFs, screenshots, invoices, work files, and research files. It analyzes supported files locally and lets you preview proposed folders and names before applying changes.

  • Supported systems: Windows 10, Windows 11, and macOS.
  • Price: $14.99 one-time purchase.
  • No cloud upload is required for organization workflows.

Download for Windows Download for macOS

How Foldora works

  1. Select a folder on your computer.
  2. Foldora analyzes supported files locally.
  3. Review proposed categories and filenames.
  4. Apply only the changes you approve.
